dc_description: A wide rural landscape with dry golden grass in the foreground, rolling tan hills and distant blue-gray mountains under a pale blue sky. On the right side, a tall weathered white post holds a rectangular sign that reads "DIVIETO DI CACCIA," indicating no hunting. The scene appears arid and open, with sparse shrubs and a few darker wooded patches on the hills.
novel_visual_observations: The no-hunting sign is mounted high on a narrow, worn post and is positioned near the right edge of the frame.
A single wispy white cloud is visible in the upper left sky, while most of the sky is clear.
location_name: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Siena
rich_context: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Unione dei Comuni Amiata Val d'Orcia, Siena, Toscana, Italia
